boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?

final_answer: Source records confirm deviation closure exactly matches batch X-78, assay AX-22, Cq<=31, and 2026-06-28 release date before shipment. Policy STD-XOR-078-P requires this precise match for completion. Visible alert is resolved by matching closure evidence. Action boundary is closed; release may proceed.
